Employee Name: [PERSON]

Department: Engineering
Manager Name: [PERSON]: [SALARY]
Review Period: [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME], 2022

Competency Ratings: 
Technical Skills: 4
Problem Solving: 5
Communication: 4
Teamwork: 5
Overall, [PERSON] has demonstrated exceptional technical skills and problem-solving abilities, consistently delivering high-quality results on complex projects. He has effectively collaborated with cross-functional teams, ensuring seamless execution and timely completion of tasks. His excellent teamwork and communication skills have been particularly notable, as he has successfully facilitated knowledge-sharing sessions and provided constructive feedback to his peers.

During the review period, [PERSON] has taken on additional responsibilities, including mentoring junior engineers and contributing to the development of new engineering standards. His expertise and dedication have been invaluable to the team, and his contributions have significantly impacted the department's overall performance. To further grow and develop, [PERSON] should focus on expanding his leadership skills, exploring opportunities to lead projects and initiatives that align with the company's strategic objectives. With his strong technical foundation and exceptional collaboration skills, [PERSON] is well-positioned for continued success and growth within the organization.
